dashboard.subtitle: Manage your resumes, applications, and interview preparation in one place.
dashboard.emptyAppsHint: Add a job application to start building your pipeline.
dashboard.noActivity: No activity yet. Create a resume or application to get started.
dashboard.trackAJob: Track a job you've applied to.
dashboard.emptyResumesHint: Create your first resume version to get started.

resumes.title: Resume versions
resumes.subtitle: Create and manage tailored versions of your resume.
resumes.emptyHint: Create your first resume version to get started.

applications.title: Applications
applications.subtitle: Track every job you've applied to and what's next.
applications.emptyHint: Add a job application to start tracking it.

settings.title: AI Settings
settings.subtitle: Connect your own AI key to enable “Improve with AI” suggestions across your resume sections.
settings.builtInHeading: ✓ AI suggestions are built in — no setup needed.
settings.builtInBody: Open any resume, then click ✦ Improve with AI on the Summary or a Work Experience entry. You get {limit} free suggestions per day{used}.
settings.notConfigured: Built-in AI isn’t configured on this deployment yet. You can still use AI by adding your own key below.
settings.advancedToggle: Advanced: use your own API key (optional)
settings.advancedHintBuiltIn: Optional — only if you want unlimited suggestions on your own account, bypassing the daily limit.
settings.advancedHintNoKey: Add a key to enable AI suggestions.
settings.byokBanner: Bring your own AI key (BYOK) for unlimited use on your own account. Create a key at openrouter.ai/keys — one key works with GPT, Claude, Gemini and more. Usage is billed to your OpenRouter account; your key is encrypted and stored in your own Google Drive, never on our servers.
settings.modelHint: Any slug from <link>openrouter.ai/models</link>. Cheaper models (e.g. gpt-4o-mini, claude-3.5-haiku) are plenty for resume edits.
settings.keySavedPlaceholder: Key saved ({masked}). Enter a new key to replace.
settings.keyConfigured: ✓ A key is configured. Leave this blank to keep it.

signin.headline: Land more interviews with resumes built to <accent>beat the ATS</accent>.
signin.sub: Resumeflow-ATS helps you tailor each resume to the job, track every application, and prepare for interviews — all in one place, with your data saved privately to your own Google Drive.
signin.feature1Desc: Match every resume to the job description in seconds.
signin.feature2Desc: Clean, parseable templates that applicant-tracking systems can read.
signin.feature3Desc: See all your roles in one clear pipeline, from saved to offer.
signin.feature4Desc: Get AI-generated questions and answer guidance for each job.
signin.feature5Desc: Download polished PDF, Word, and PowerPoint versions.
signin.feature6Desc: Your data is saved to your own Google Drive — not our servers.
signin.getStartedSub: Sign in to create your first tailored resume in minutes.
signin.scopeNote: We request access only to Resumeflow-ATS's own app data folder in your Google Drive.

tailor.title: Tailor resume for this job
tailor.subtitle: AI rephrases and reorders your existing content — it never invents facts. Review each change; your source resume is not modified.
tailor.noResumesBanner: You don't have any resumes yet. Tailoring rephrases an existing resume for this job, so create one first — then come back here to tailor it.
tailor.sourceHint: Defaults to your Base Resume. Your own API key (Settings) is recommended for frequent tailoring.
tailor.noChanges: The tailoring produced no changes — your resume already reads well for this job description.
tailor.proposedChanges: {count, plural, one {# proposed change} other {# proposed changes}} — review each one. Rejecting keeps your original wording.
tailor.nothingToSave: Every change is rejected — there's nothing to save.

errors.sourceLoad: Could not load the source resume. Please try again.
errors.save: Could not save the tailored resume.
errors.networkSave: Network error while saving. Please try again.

coverLetter.intro: Drafts a letter from your resume and this job's description — using only facts from your resume. You edit before sending; nothing is saved until you press Save.
coverLetter.unverifiedWarning: Double-check these figures — they weren't found in your resume or the job description:

errors.save: Could not save the cover letter.
errors.clipboard: Couldn't access the clipboard — select and copy manually.

actions.intro: Generated from your resume and this job — review before using.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

improve.addTextFirst: Add some text first, then improve it with AI.
improve.network: Network error contacting the AI service.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.description: Your session may have expired. Sign out and back in to reconnect to your Google Drive, or retry the page.

docs.metaOnly: Stores document metadata only (no files are uploaded).

actions.confirmDelete: Delete this application? This cannot be undone.

detail.interviewCoachHint: Prepare questions and answers for this application — grounded in your resume, Work Journal, and this job description.

new.title: New application
new.subtitle: Record a job you're applying to and link a resume version.

page.newSubtitle: Fill in your details and pick a template. The preview updates live.

import.title: Start from an existing resume
import.description: Upload one or more PDF or Word (.docx) files and AI will sort and merge them into the sections below. Nothing is saved until you press “Create resume”.
import.parsing: Parsing and categorizing with AI — this can take a few seconds.
import.imported: Imported. Review the sections below, then press “Create resume” to save.

preview.title: Live preview
preview.clickHint: Click any part of the page to jump to its editor.

mobile.tapToEdit: Tap a section to edit it

style.hint: Applied live to the preview and saved with this version. Margins set the printed A4 page margins. The ATS Corporate Style template uses every setting; other templates use the font and primary color.

basics.headline: Headline / title
basics.photoHint: Saved as an image in your Google Drive app data (only the file reference is kept in the resume). Shown in the ATS Corporate Style template header. In local dev mode it is embedded as Base64.

summary.label: Professional summary
summary.placeholder: 2-3 sentences summarizing your experience and strengths.

experience.highlightsHint: One bullet per line — Enter adds a bullet

areas.addPlaceholder: Add an area of expertise and press Enter
areas.hint: Rendered as a balanced two-column list on the ATS Corporate Style template, using the selected bullet style.

sections.intro: Reorder, rename, and show/hide the sections of the resume document. This order and these names apply to the live preview and to the PDF, DOCX, and PPTX exports. Empty sections are hidden automatically. “Break after” forces the next section onto a new A4 page (ATS Corporate Style template, preview + PDF).

custom.intro: Add your own sections (Projects, Awards, Publications, …). Each one joins the document order in the “Document Sections” card, so you can place it anywhere and it flows into the live preview and every export.
custom.addItemPlaceholder: Add an item and press Enter

interviewCoach.title: Interview Coach
interviewCoach.subtitle: Prepare questions and answers grounded in your Work Journal, resume, and the job you're targeting.
interviewCoach.noJobDescription: This application has no job description.
interviewCoach.manualPlaceholder: Type a question, e.g. "Tell me about yourself"
interviewCoach.bannerAdded: {count, plural, one {# new question added} other {# new questions added}}.
interviewCoach.bannerAddedSkipped: {count, plural, one {# new question added} other {# new questions added}} ({skipped} already existed).
interviewCoach.confirmDelete: Delete this question and its answer?
interviewCoach.confirmRegenerate: Replace the saved answer with a newly generated one? Your current answer will be overwritten (revision history is kept).

empty.title: No questions yet
empty.hintApplication: Generate questions from the job description, or type one above.
empty.hintGeneral: Type a question above, or pick an application to generate JD-based questions.

entry.answerPlaceholder: Write your answer here — or generate one with AI.

resumeDetail.deleteNeedsBaseAlert: Select a Base Resume first. You must designate a Base Resume before you can delete any resume version.
resumeDetail.deleteBaseAlert: The Base Resume can't be deleted. Designate a different version as the Base Resume first.
resumeDetail.deleteConfirm: Delete this resume version? This cannot be undone.
resumeDetail.deleteNeedsBaseTitle: Select a Base Resume first before deleting any version.
resumeDetail.deleteBaseTitle: The Base Resume can't be deleted.
resumeDetail.atsSafeHint: (single column, no photo — affects preview, PDF & DOCX)

history.title: Version history
history.empty: No snapshots yet. They're captured automatically as you edit — at most one every 10 minutes — and before every restore.
history.restoreConfirm: Restore the resume to its state from {when}? Your current state is snapshotted first, so you can undo this from history.
history.comparingFrom: Comparing snapshot from {when} with the current state

ats.verdictMedium: Getting there — work through the fixes below
ats.verdictWeak: Needs work — start with the failed checks
ats.pasteJdHint: paste a job description to add keyword match
ats.jdPlaceholder: Paste the job description here — keywords are extracted locally and matched against your resume as you type.
ats.missingKeywordsHint: Weave missing keywords into your summary, skills, or bullets — but only where they're true.
ats.disclaimer: Scores are heuristic guidance computed locally — nothing is sent to a server. Different ATS vendors parse differently; the ATS-safe export is the safest format for portals.

workJournal.title: Work Journal
workJournal.subtitle: Capture projects, achievements, and STAR stories while they're fresh — then turn them into resume bullets.
workJournal.phCapture: e.g. "Coordinated Verification 7.1 release planning and testing across 4 teams"
workJournal.captureHint: Type a rough sentence — AI turns it into a STAR achievement.
workJournal.aiExpandFailed: AI couldn't draft this — try rephrasing.
workJournal.emptyHint: Write down what you worked on — the project, the problem, the impact — before you forget the details.
workJournal.noMatchHint: Try a different search or clear the filters.
workJournal.confirmDelete: Delete this journal entry? This can't be undone.
workJournal.phTitle: e.g. Migrated batch jobs to cloud scheduler
workJournal.phProblemSolved: What was broken, slow, risky, or missing?
workJournal.phImpactResult: What changed because of your work?
workJournal.evidenceHint: Link the ticket, doc, or page that backs this up.
workJournal.outputsStale: This entry changed after these were generated — regenerate to refresh.
workJournal.outputsHint: Turn this achievement into a resume bullet, a STAR interview story, a LinkedIn post, and performance-review wording — in one click.
workJournal.insightsHint: Get an AI read on your strengths, promotion-readiness gaps, and what to capture next.
workJournal.insightsNeedMore: Add at least 3 entries to generate insights.
workJournal.insightsStale: Your journal changed since these were generated — regenerate to refresh.
workJournal.noExperienceEntries: That resume has no experience entries.
